uiBuilder.label: Record Form
uiBuilder.description: Experimental self-fetching record form. Reads form layout from sys_ui_section/sys_ui_element and record values from the Table API. Auto-save fields PATCH immediately on blur; all other dirty fields save on the Save button.

properties.name: sysId
properties.label: Record Sys ID
properties.description: The sys_id of the record to display.

properties.name: formView
properties.label: Form view
properties.description: Form view name as configured in the form builder (e.g. Default view).

properties.name: autoSaveFields
properties.label: Auto-save fields
properties.description: JSON array of field names that PATCH the record immediately on blur, e.g. ["short_description","priority"]. All other dirty fields require the Save button.

properties.name: readonly
properties.label: Read-only
properties.description: When on, all fields are read-only and the Save button is hidden.

actions.name: FIELD_CHANGED
actions.label: Field changed
actions.description: Fired when any field value changes (on blur). Payload: { name, value }.

actions.name: FIELD_AUTO_SAVED
actions.label: Field auto-saved
actions.description: Fired when an auto-save field has been successfully PATCHed to the record. Payload: { name, value }.

actions.name: FORM_SAVED
actions.label: Form saved
actions.description: Fired when the Save button successfully PATCHes all non-auto-save dirty fields. Payload: { values }.

payload.name: values
payload.label: Saved values
payload.description: Object of { fieldName: value } that was PATCHed.

actions.name: FORM_LOAD_ERROR
actions.label: Form load error
actions.description: Fired when the form layout or record fetch fails. Payload: { error }.

actions.name: FORM_SAVE_ERROR
actions.label: Form save error
actions.description: Fired when a PATCH (auto-save or Save button) fails. Payload: { error }.
